schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriclture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.benefit_summary: You get ₹6,000 every year directly in your bank account - paid 3 times a year as ₹2000 each. No office visit needed
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: आपको हर साल ₹6,000 सीधे बैंक खाते में मिलते हैं — साल में तीन बार, हर बार ₹2,000। कोई दफ्तर जाने की जरूरत नहीं।

other_conditions: Must own cultivable land (any size)
Land must be in applicant's name in state land records
Aadhaar must be linked to bank account (eKYC required)
exclusions: Government employees (central or state)
Income tax payers in previous assessment year
Constitutional post holders (MP, MLA, Mayor, etc.)
Institutional landholders (trusts, companies)
Retired pensioners with monthly pension above ₹10,000

how_to_apply.online: Visit pmkisan.gov.in → Farmers Corner → New Farmer Registration → enter Aadhaar and mobile → fill form → submit
how_to_apply.offline: Visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) with documents

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
schemes.benefit_summary: Free hospital treatment up to ₹5 lakh per year for your whole family. Covers 1,929 medical procedures including surgery, medicines, and ICU. Works at 29,000+ empanelled hospitals.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: आपके पूरे परिवार का ₹5 लाख तक का इलाज मुफ्त। 1,929 बीमारियों का इलाज होता है। देश के 29,000 से ज़्यादा अस्पतालों में यह सुविधा मिलती है।

other_conditions: Family must be listed in SECC-2011 database (Socio-Economic Caste Census)
OR belong to D1-D7 deprivation categories in rural areas
OR be in occupational categories for urban areas
exclusions: Families not in SECC-2011 data
High-income families

documents_required: Ration Card (if family name not found in SECC data)

how_to_apply.online: Check eligibility at beneficiary.nha.gov.in using Aadhaar or ration card number
how_to_apply.offline: Visit nearest empanelled hospital — Ayushman Mitra at hospital will check eligibility and issue card on-site

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
schemes.benefit_summary: Free LPG gas connection for women in BPL families. You get a free cylinder, regulator, and pipe. Saves you from cooking on firewood and protects your health.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: BPL परिवार की महिलाओं को मुफ्त गैस कनेक्शन। सिलेंडर, रेगुलेटर और पाइप — सब मुफ्त। लकड़ी के धुएं से आज़ादी।

other_conditions: Adult woman (18+) in the household
No existing LPG connection at home
Name in SECC-2011 data OR belongs to SC/ST/PM Awas Yojana beneficiary/Antyodaya Anna Yojana/forest dwellers/tea garden workers
exclusions: Households that already have an LPG connection

documents_required: Self-declaration that no LPG connection exists at home

how_to_apply.online: Visit pmuy.gov.in or apply through nearest LPG distributor (IndianOil / HP / Bharat Gas)
how_to_apply.offline: Visit the nearest LPG gas agency with documents

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awaas Yojana - Gramin, Uttrakhand
schemes.ministry: Department of Rural Development, Government of Uttrakhand
schemes.benefit_summary: Eligible families get ₹1.3 lakh to build a house, ₹12000 for a toilet, 95 days of MGNREGA work, and ₹6000 for kitchen utensils after the house is completed directly to the bank account through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT). No office visit needed
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: पात्र परिवारों को घर बनाने के लिए ₹1.3 लाख, शौचालय के लिए ₹12,000, मनरेगा के तहत 95 दिनों का काम और घर बनने के बाद रसोई के बर्तनों के लिए ₹6,000 दिए जाते हैं। सीधे बैंक खाते में मिलते हैं, कोई दफ्तर जाने की जरूरत नहीं।

other_conditions: Name in SECC-2011 data OR in Awas Plus Permanent Waiting List
exclusions: Not in SECC-2011 data
Not a resident of Uttrakhand

life_events: need financial help for house construction
listed in SECC-2011 or Awaas Plus waiting list

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
schemes.ministry: Department of Women and Child Welfare, Government of Sikkim
schemes.benefit_summary: Senior citizens aged 60-69 years get ₹1,500 monthly pension, people aged 70 years and above get ₹2,000 per month, and those aged 80 years or more get ₹2,500 every month for lifetime.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: 60-69 वर्ष के वरिष्ठ नागरिकों को ₹1,500 मासिक पेंशन, 70 वर्ष या उससे अधिक आयु वालों को ₹2,000 प्रति माह, और 80 वर्ष या उससे अधिक आयु वालों को जीवनभर हर महीने ₹2,500 पेंशन दी जाती है।

other_conditions: Opened bank account under Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
Must submit Life Certificate every year in November
Pension can be transferred to spouse after death of pensioner if the spouse is 60 years or older
exclusions: No source of income
Not a recipient of salary/pension/family pension from Central Governments/ Other State Governments
If both husband and wife are eligible, only one family member can recieve pension at a time
Pension may stop if Life Certificate is not submitted

documents_required: Attested photocopy of Sikkim Subject Certificate / Certificate of Identification, Income Certificate, Caste Certificate
Attested photocopy of the Below Poverty Line Certificate
Birth Certificate or Electoral Photo Identity Card or any other valid document having recorded the date as proof of age
Attested photocopy of first page of the Bank/Post Office Passbook along with the photocopy of the latest updated account

how_to_apply.online: Visit https://pensionscheme.sikkim.gov.in and apply, upload the required documents and check the application status updates timely
how_to_apply.offline: visit the nearest Gram Panchayat/Municipality office with the required documents and yearly Life Certificate submission in November

life_events: senior citizen aged 60 years or above
does not receive any government pension

schemes.name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Gurantee Act
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Rural Development
schemes.benefit_summary: You are guaranteed 100 days of paid work every year. The work is near your village (within 5 km). If no work is given within 15 days of applying, you get an unemployment allowance. Wages are paid directly to your bank account.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: हर साल 100 दिन का काम आपके गांव के पास ही मिलता है। अगर 15 दिन में काम नहीं मिला तो बेरोजगारी भत्ता मिलता है। मजदूरी सीधे बैंक खाते में आती है।

other_conditions: Must be a resident of a rural area
Must be willing to do unskilled manual labour
Must apply to the local Gram Panchayat for a Job Card
exclusions: Urban residents are not eligible
Those unwilling to do manual unskilled work

documents_required: Proof of rural residence (Ration card or Voter ID)

how_to_apply.online: Visit nrega.nic.in or apply through the Gram Panchayat office
how_to_apply.offline: Submit a written or oral application to your local Ward Member or Gram Panchayat. A Job Card will be issued within 15 days.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Finance
schemes.benefit_summary: Open a zero-balance bank account for free. You get a free RuPay debit card, ₹2 lakh accident insurance, ₹10,000 overdraft facility after 6 months, and access to all government DBT payments.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: बिना किसी पैसे के बैंक खाता खुलता है। मुफ्त RuPay कार्ड मिलता है, ₹2 लाख का दुर्घटना बीमा मिलता है और 6 महीने बाद ₹10,000 का ओवरड्राफ्ट भी मिल सकता है।

other_conditions: Must be a citizen of India
Should not already have a bank account (those with existing accounts can also open, but the scheme targets the unbanked)
exclusions: Non Indian citizens

documents_required: If no Aadhaar: any one of Voter ID Card, Driving License, Passport, or NREGA Job Card
If no valid documents: a letter from a Gazetted Officer certifying identity (bank classifies as low-risk account)

how_to_apply.online: Visit pmjdy.gov.in to locate nearest bank branch or Business Correspondent (Bank Mitra)
how_to_apply.offline: Walk into any bank branch (nationalised, private, or Regional Rural Bank) with documents and fill the PMJDY account opening form

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Finance
schemes.benefit_summary: People aged 18-50 years get a ₹2 lakh life insurance cover for one year against death due to any reason by paying ₹436 yearly premium through bank or post office account auto-debit.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: 18-50 वर्ष के लोगों को बैंक या पोस्ट ऑफिस खाते से ₹436 वार्षिक प्रीमियम ऑटो-डेबिट के माध्यम से किसी भी कारण से मृत्यु होने पर 1 वर्ष के लिए ₹2 लाख का जीवन बीमा कवर मिलता है।

other_conditions: Must hold an individual bank or post office account
Premium of ₹436 per year is auto-debited from the account
Insurance cover is renewable every year
exclusions: People below 18 years of age
People above 50 years of age
People without a bank or post office account

how_to_apply.online: Apply online through the net banking facility of the participating bank
how_to_apply.offline: Download and fill the Consent-cum-Declaration Form and submit it with required documents at the authorised Bank/Post Office

life_events: has a bank or post office account
wants insurance against death due to any reason

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Finance
schemes.benefit_summary: People aged 18-70 years get accident insurance cover of ₹2 lakh for accidental death or permanent total disability and ₹1 lakh for partial disability by paying ₹20 yearly premium through bank or post office account auto-debit.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: 18-70 वर्ष के लोगों को बैंक या पोस्ट ऑफिस खाते से ₹20 वार्षिक प्रीमियम ऑटो-डेबिट के माध्यम से दुर्घटना में मृत्यु या पूर्ण स्थायी विकलांगता पर ₹2 लाख और आंशिक विकलांगता पर ₹1 लाख का बीमा कवर मिलता है।

other_conditions: Must hold an individual bank or post office account
Must give consent for auto-debit facility
Premium of ₹20 per year is auto-debited from the account
Aadhaar is the primary KYC document
Insurance cover is renewable every year from 1st June to 31st May
exclusions: People below 18 years of age
People above 70 years of age
People without a bank or post office account
Insurance cover terminates if account is closed or has insufficient balance
If enrolled through multiple accounts, insurance cover is restricted to one account only

documents_required: PMSBY enrolment/consent form (available at bank or via net banking)

how_to_apply.online: Apply online through the net banking facility of the participating bank
how_to_apply.offline: Download and fill the application form and submit it with required documents at the bank where the savings account is held

life_events: has a bank or post office account
wants insurance for accidental death or disability

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.benefit_summary: Pregnant and lactating women get ₹5,000 for the first child in two instalments and ₹6,000 for the second child if it is a girl child, along with additional maternity benefits under Janani Suraksha Yojana.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: गर्भवती और स्तनपान कराने वाली महिलाओं को पहले बच्चे के लिए दो किस्तों में ₹5,000 और दूसरे बच्चे के लड़की होने पर ₹6,000 की सहायता राशि दी जाती है, साथ ही जननी सुरक्षा योजना के तहत अतिरिक्त मातृत्व लाभ भी मिलता है।

other_conditions: Applicant must be pregnant or lactating
Applicant should be experiencing wage loss due to pregnancy
Applicable for first live child
Second child benefit is only for girl child
Application must be submitted within 270 days of childbirth
Must complete required antenatal checkups
Child immunization and birth registration are mandatory
Aadhaar linked bank or post office account required
Twins/triplets/quadruplets with one or more girl child in second pregnancy are eligible under PMMVY 2.0
exclusions: Women employed under Central Government, State Government or Public Sector Undertakings
Women already receiving similar maternity benefits under any law
Women below 19 years of age

documents_required: Aadhaar linked bank or post office account details

how_to_apply.online: Visit the PMMVY portal, create an account using mobile number, login, fill beneficiary registration details, upload required documents and submit the application

life_events: experiencing wage loss due to pregnancy
needs support for child care and nutrition

schemes.name: National Scholarship Portal — Pre-Matric and Post-Matric Scholarships (All Categories)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology / Multiple Ministries
schemes.benefit_summary: 140+ scholarship schemes for students from Class 1 to PhD in one place. Money goes directly to your bank account. Scholarships range from ₹1,000 to ₹20,000+ per year depending on the scheme and category.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: Class 1 से PhD तक के लिए 140+ छात्रवृत्ति योजनाएं एक ही पोर्टल पर। पैसा सीधे बैंक खाते में आता है। ₹1,000 से ₹20,000+ तक की राशि।

other_conditions: Must be enrolled in a recognised school or college in India
Minimum marks vary by scheme (typically 50%+ in previous exam)
Family annual income usually below ₹2.5 lakh (varies by scheme)
OTR (One Time Registration) on NSP portal required — done using Aadhaar
exclusions: Students already receiving scholarship from another Central Government scheme (no duplicate scholarships)
Students in private unaided schools for some pre-matric schemes
Students whose family income exceeds the scheme-specific ceiling

documents_required: Bank passbook (with IFSC code, account in student's name)
Income certificate of parent/guardian (issued by tehsil)

how_to_apply.online: Visit scholarships.gov.in → complete OTR using Aadhaar → login → select scholarship scheme → fill form → upload documents → submit
how_to_apply.offline: No offline application — must apply online. CSC centres can help with registration

schemes.name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC/ST students
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment/ Ministry of Tribal Affairs
schemes.benefit_summary: Full scholarship for SC and ST students studying after Class 10 — covers maintenance allowance, study tour charges, thesis typing charges, and book allowance. Amount ranges from ₹3,800 to ₹9,900 per year depending on course level.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: Class 10 के बाद पढ़ने वाले SC/ST छात्रों को पूरी स्कॉलरशिप। रखरखाव भत्ता, किताब भत्ता सब शामिल। ₹3,800 से ₹9,900 सालाना तक।

other_conditions: Must be studyingin class 11 or above (post-matriculation level)
Must be enrolled in a recognised institution
Family annual income must not exceed ₹2.5 lakh per year
exclusions: Students already receiving full scholarship from state government for the same course
SC/ST students whose family income exceeds ₹2.5 lakh

documents_required: Income certificate (family income, issued by tehsil)

how_to_apply.online: Apply via scholarships.gov.in (NSP Portal) after completing OTR
how_to_apply.offline: No direct offline application — NSP portal is mandatory

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Finance
schemes.benefit_summary: Open a savings account for your daughter below 10 years old. The government gives the highest interest rate (currently 8.2% per year). Deposit ₹250 to ₹1.5 lakh per year. Full amount with interest is given when your daughter turns 21 — tax free.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: 10 साल से छोटी बेटी के नाम बचत खाता खुलता है। सरकार 8.2% ब्याज देती है। साल में ₹250 से ₹1.5 लाख तक जमा करें। बेटी के 21 साल होने पर पूरा पैसा+ब्याज मिलेगा — टैक्स फ्री।

other_conditions: Account is opened by parent or legal guardian for a girl child
Girl child must be below 10 years of age at time of account opening
Maximum 2 accounts per family (one per daughter); 3 if twins/triplets in second birth
Minimum deposit ₹250/year; maximum ₹1.5 lakh/year
Account matures when girl turns 21 or at marriage after age 18 (whichever is earlier)
exclusions: Accounts cannot be opened for boy child
Cannot open more than 2 accounts per family (except twins/triplets)
Girl child above 10 years of age is not eligible

documents_required: Birth certificate of the girl child

how_to_apply.online: Visit India Post or any authorised bank (SBI, BOI, PNB, etc.) website to start account
how_to_apply.offline: Visit nearest Post Office or authorised bank branch with documents

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Finance
schemes.benefit_summary: Get a business loan from ₹50,000 to ₹10 lakh without any collateral (no property guarantee needed). Three tiers: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,001–₹5 lakh), Tarun (₹5 lakh–₹10 lakh)
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: बिना किसी जमानत के ₹50,000 से ₹10 लाख तक का बिज़नेस लोन। शिशु (₹50,000 तक), किशोर (₹5 लाख तक), तरुण (₹10 लाख तक) — तीन प्रकार।

other_conditions: Applicant must be starting or expanding a non-farm micro/small enterprise
Business must be in manufacturing, trading, or services sector
Must not have defaulted on any previous bank loan
exclusions: Agricultural activities (separate schemes exist for farmers)
Applicants who have defaulted on loans from any financial institution
Large enterprises — only micro and small businesses are covered

documents_required: Business plan or quotation for the loan purpose
Caste certificate (for SC/ST/OBC — for possible interest subsidy)

how_to_apply.online: Apply via udyamimitra.in (Mudra's official online portal) or directly at any bank/NBFC/MFI
how_to_apply.offline: Visit nearest bank branch (PSU, private, or cooperative) with documents and fill Mudra loan application

schemes.name: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
schemes.benefit_summary: Street vendors get collateral-free working capital loans up to ₹50,000 in stages, 7% interest subsidy, monthly digital transaction cashback, and UPI linked RuPay credit card benefits to support and expand their business.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: स्ट्रीट वेंडर्स को बिना गारंटी के चरणबद्ध तरीके से ₹50,000 तक का कार्यशील पूंजी ऋण, 7% ब्याज सब्सिडी, डिजिटल लेनदेन पर मासिक कैशबैक और UPI लिंक्ड RuPay क्रेडिट कार्ड की सुविधा व्यवसाय बढ़ाने के लिए दी जाती है।

other_conditions: Must possess Certificate of Vending or Identity Card issued by ULB
Surveyed vendors without Certificate of Vending are eligible
Vendors with Letter of Recommendation issued by ULB/TVC are eligible
Must have Aadhaar linked mobile number for e-KYC
Next loan tranche available on timely or early repayment
Digital transactions are encouraged for cashback benefits
exclusions: Vendors without valid Certificate of Vending, Identity Card or Letter of Recommendation
Non-street vendors
Loan benefits may stop for non-performing loan accounts

documents_required: Copy of Account Statement or Passbook
Loan Closure Document for second loan

how_to_apply.online: Visit the PM SVANidhi portal, login using mobile number and OTP, fill the application form, upload required documents and submit the application
how_to_apply.offline: Visit the bank or Urban Local Body office with required documents, complete eligibility verification and submit the loan application form

life_events: wants to restart or expand business
needs financial support for vending business

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana: Per Drop More Crop
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriclture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.benefit_summary: Farmers get financial assistance for drip and sprinkler irrigation systems, water conservation structures and farm ponds, with subsidy up to 55% for small and marginal farmers and 45% for other farmers through Direct Benefit Transfer.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: किसानों को ड्रिप और स्प्रिंकलर सिंचाई प्रणाली, जल संरक्षण संरचनाओं और फार्म पॉन्ड के लिए वित्तीय सहायता दी जाती है, जिसमें छोटे और सीमांत किसानों को 55% तथा अन्य किसानों को 45% तक सब्सिडी DBT के माध्यम से मिलती है।

other_conditions: Applicant must be a citizen of India
Subsidy available up to 5 hectares per beneficiary
Only BIS-marked irrigation systems/components are allowed
Aadhaar details are mandatory for DBT benefits
Applicable for farmers of all States and Union Territories
exclusions: Farmers using non BIS-marked irrigation systems/components
Land area above 5 hectares is not eligible for subsidy benefits

how_to_apply.offline: Visit the Block/District Agriculture Office or Gram Panchayat, collect and submit the application form with required documents to the concerned authority

life_events: wants drip or sprinkler irrigation system

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana - Short Term Training
schemes.ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.benefit_summary: Youth aged 15-45 years get free skill training, soft skills, entrepreneurship and digital literacy training, placement assistance, insurance, stipends and other support for employment and career growth.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: 15-45 वर्ष के युवाओं को रोजगार और करियर विकास के लिए मुफ्त कौशल प्रशिक्षण, सॉफ्ट स्किल्स, उद्यमिता और डिजिटल साक्षरता प्रशिक्षण, प्लेसमेंट सहायता, बीमा, स्टाइपेंड और अन्य सहायता दी जाती है।

other_conditions: Applicant must be an Indian citizen
Must possess Aadhar card
Must have Aadhaar linked bank account
Must fulfil eligibility criteria for the selected job role
Minimum 70% attendance is required for assessment eligibility
exclusions: People below 15 years of age
People above 45 years of age
Applicants without Aadhar card
Applicants without Aadhaar linked bank account
Candidates with less than 70% attendance are not eligible for assessment

documents_required: Documents required for the selected job role

how_to_apply.offline: Visit the nearest PMKVY Training Centre and apply for the desired training course

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Finance
schemes.benefit_summary: People aged 18-40 years who are not income tax payers get guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after 60 years of age by making regular contributions through auto-debit from their savings account.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: 18-40 वर्ष के गैर-आयकरदाता लोगों को बचत खाते से नियमित ऑटो-डेबिट योगदान के माध्यम से 60 वर्ष की आयु के बाद ₹1,000 से ₹5,000 तक की गारंटीड मासिक पेंशन मिलती है।

other_conditions: Applicant must be an Indian citizen
Must have a savings bank or post office account
Contribution is made through auto-debit
Subscriber must contribute till 60 years of age
KYC is required through Aadhaar or bank account
Pension starts after attaining 60 years of age
exclusions: Income tax payers are not eligible from 1 October 2022
People below 18 years of age
People above 40 years of age

documents_required: Savings Bank or Post Office Account

how_to_apply.online: Apply through net banking, e-APY portal or eNPS website by filling personal, nominee and contribution details and completing Aadhaar based KYC
how_to_apply.offline: Visit the nearest bank branch or post office where the savings account is held and submit the APY registration form

schemes.name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC/ST Students (Class 9 & 10)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / Ministry of Tribal Affairs
schemes.benefit_summary: Scholarship for SC and ST students in Class 9 and Class 10. You get a maintenance allowance of ₹150/month (day scholar) or ₹350/month (hosteller), plus book and stationery allowance of ₹750/year
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: Class 9 और 10 में पढ़ने वाले SC/ST छात्रों को छात्रवृत्ति। डे स्कॉलर को ₹150/माह और हॉस्टलर को ₹350/माह के अलावा ₹750/साल किताब भत्ता|

other_conditions: Must be studying in Class 9 or Class 10
Must be enrolled in a government or recognised private school
Family annual income must not exceed ₹2 lakh per year
exclusions: Students in Class 1 to 8 (separate state-level scheme applies)
Students whose family income exceeds ₹2 lakh

documents_required: Bank passbook (in student's or parent's name)

how_to_apply.online: Apply via scholarships.gov.in (NSP Portal)
how_to_apply.offline: Contact school/district welfare office for assistance

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriclture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.benefit_summary: Farmers get crop insurance against natural disasters, pests and diseases at low premium rates, with compensation for crop loss, post-harvest damage and local calamities.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: किसानों को प्राकृतिक आपदाओं, कीटों और बीमारियों से फसल नुकसान पर कम प्रीमियम दरों में बीमा और फसल हानि, कटाई के बाद नुकसान तथा स्थानीय आपदाओं पर मुआवजा मिलता है।

other_conditions: Applicant must be growing notified crops in notified areas
Must have insurable interest in the insured crops
Must possess valid land ownership proof or land tenure agreement
Application must be submitted within prescribed time period
Farmer should not receive compensation for the same crop loss from another source
exclusions: Crop losses in non-notified areas
Losses outside the crop cycle
Losses due to negligence or non-compliance with agricultural practices
Losses beyond specified limits
Non-payment of premium

documents_required: Land Records or Land Possession Certificate

how_to_apply.online: Visit the PMFBY portal, register/login through Farmer Corner, fill the application form, upload documents, pay premium and submit the application
how_to_apply.offline: Visit the nearest participating bank or insurance office, fill the application form, attach required documents and pay the premium amount

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.benefit_summary: Farmers get low-interest loans through Kisan Credit Card for crop cultivation, post-harvest expenses, farm maintenance, agricultural activities and allied farming needs with interest rates as low as 4% per year on timely repayment.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: किसानों को फसल खेती, कटाई के बाद के खर्च, कृषि उपकरण रखरखाव और अन्य कृषि गतिविधियों के लिए किसान क्रेडिट कार्ड के माध्यम से कम ब्याज दर पर ऋण मिलता है, जिसमें समय पर भुगतान करने पर ब्याज दर केवल 4% प्रतिवर्ष होती है।

other_conditions: Applicant should be involved in agriculture or allied activities
SHGs and JLGs of farmers are eligible
Must have valid landholding or cultivation proof
Bank may ask for collateral for higher loan limits

documents_required: Security Documents for higher loan amount
Any other documents required by the bank

how_to_apply.online: Visit the official website of the preferred bank, select Kisan Credit Card, fill the application form and submit it online
how_to_apply.offline: Visit the nearest bank branch or download the application form from the bank website and submit it with required documents

schemes.name: RKVY Soil Health and Fertility - Soil Health Card
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.benefit_summary: Farmers get Soil Health Cards with soil testing reports, fertilizer recommendations and soil improvement advice to help improve crop production and reduce fertilizer costs.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: किसानों को मिट्टी परीक्षण रिपोर्ट, उर्वरक सुझाव और मिट्टी सुधार सलाह के साथ सॉइल हेल्थ कार्ड दिया जाता है, जिससे फसल उत्पादन बढ़ाने और उर्वरक खर्च कम करने में मदद मिलती है।

other_conditions: Applicant must be a farmer in India
Soil sample collection and testing is required

how_to_apply.offline: Visit the District Agriculture Officer or Block Agriculture Officer for soil testing and Soil Health Card generation

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha Evam Utthan Mahabhiyan
schemes.ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
schemes.benefit_summary: Farmers get up to 60% subsidy and 30% loan support for installing solar pumps and solar plants for irrigation, and can also earn income by selling extra electricity to the government.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: किसानों को सिंचाई के लिए सोलर पंप और सोलर प्लांट लगाने पर 60% तक सब्सिडी और 30% तक ऋण सहायता मिलती है, साथ ही अतिरिक्त बिजली सरकार को बेचकर आय भी कमाई जा सकती है।

other_conditions: Applicant can be an individual farmer or group of farmers
Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs) are eligible
Panchayats, cooperatives and Water User Associations are eligible
Applicant must deposit 10% of total cost after approval

how_to_apply.online: Visit the official PM-KUSUM portal, register, fill the application form, upload documents and submit the application

life_events: wants to reduce diesel irrigation cost
wants to earn by selling solar electricity

schemes.name: Electronic National Agriculture Market
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.benefit_summary: Farmers get access to online national agricultural markets with better price discovery, transparent bidding, online payments and free quality testing of produce through the e-NAM platform.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: किसानों को e-NAM प्लेटफॉर्म के माध्यम से ऑनलाइन राष्ट्रीय कृषि बाजार, बेहतर मूल्य खोज, पारदर्शी बोली प्रक्रिया, ऑनलाइन भुगतान और फसल की मुफ्त गुणवत्ता जांच की सुविधा मिलती है।

other_conditions: Farmer or trader must register on the e-NAM platform
KYC verification is required
FPOs/FPCs must provide authorized person and bank details
Applicant must select a registered APMC
exclusions: Traders or middlemen (only primary producers and FPOs can register as sellers)
Farmers whose state APMC has not been integrated with eNAM (check enam.gov.in for current list)

how_to_apply.online: Visit the e-NAM portal, register as farmer, trader or FPO/FPC, complete KYC and get approval from the selected APMC
how_to_apply.offline: Visit the nearest mandi/APMC for registration and verification support

schemes.name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare
schemes.benefit_summary: Support for organic farming through cluster-based approach, soil health improvement, organic certification, and direct market linkages.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: जैविक खेती को बढ़ावा देने, मिट्टी की उर्वरता सुधारने, जैविक प्रमाणन और बाजार से सीधे जुड़ाव हेतु सहायता प्रदान की जाती है।

other_conditions: Applicant should be engaged in organic farming or willing to adopt organic farming practices
Maximum eligible land holding is 2 hectares
Farmers are encouraged to form clusters/groups for organic farming activities
Participatory Guarantee System (PGS-India) certification is promoted under the scheme
exclusions: Farmers with land holding exceeding 2 hectares are not eligible

offline: Visit the Regional Council office and apply for PKVY.
Regional Council prepares and submits the Annual Action Plan.
Funds are released to the State and Regional Councils for farmer support.

schemes.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
schemes.benefit_summary: Cash assistance for pregnant women to promote institutional delivery and reduce maternal and neonatal mortality.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: संस्थागत प्रसव को बढ़ावा देने और मातृ एवं नवजात मृत्यु दर कम करने हेतु गर्भवती महिलाओं को वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान की जाती है।

other_conditions: Applicant should deliver in a government or accredited private health institution
BPL and SC/ST women are eligible in High Performing States
APL women in Low Performing States are also eligible for institutional delivery benefits
Home delivery benefit available for BPL women
exclusions: Women not meeting BPL/SC/ST criteria in High Performing States
Women delivering outside approved institutions for institutional delivery benefits

offline: Register pregnancy through ASHA/ANM/AWW at nearest health centre.
Complete antenatal check-ups and required documentation.
Visit government or accredited health institution for delivery and receive benefits.

schemes.name: Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Labour and Employment
schemes.benefit_summary: Free health insurance of ₹30,000 per year for BPL families and unorganised workers. Covers hospitalisation, surgery, and medicines at empanelled hospitals. Cashless treatment — no advance payment needed.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: BPL परिवारों और असंगठित मजदूरों के लिए ₹30,000 तक का मुफ्त स्वास्थ्य बीमा। भर्ती, ऑपरेशन और दवाइयां — कैशलेस इलाज, पहले पैसे देने की जरूरत नहीं।

other_conditions: Must belong to a BPL household OR be an unorganised sector worker (construction, domestic, rickshaw puller, mine worker, etc.)
Entire family (up to 5 members) is covered under one smart card
Note: In many states, RSBY has been merged into Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY. Check state-specific status.
exclusions: Families above BPL threshold who are not unorganised workers
Formal sector employees already covered by ESIC or other employer insurance

documents_required: Passport-size photos of all family members

how_to_apply.online: Contact state government health department or visit rsby.gov.in
how_to_apply.offline: Visit nearest District Health Office or Common Service Centre (CSC) for smart card enrolment

schemes.id: NHM Reproductive Health - free delivery Services
schemes.name: National Health Mission — Free Maternal and Reproductive Health Services
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
schemes.benefit_summary: All pregnant women get free delivery at government hospitals — no charges for normal or C-section delivery, free medicines, free blood transfusion if needed, and free transport to hospital under Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram (JSSK).
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: सभी गर्भवती महिलाओं को सरकारी अस्पताल में मुफ्त डिलीवरी — नॉर्मल हो या सीजेरियन, दवाइयां, खून और अस्पताल आने-जाने का किराया सब मुफ्त।

other_conditions: Must be pregnant — all pregnant women qualify regardless of income or caste
Services available at all government health facilities (PHC, CHC, district hospitals)
exclusions: Services are not available at private hospitals
Those who choose private hospitals are not covered

documents_required: Antenatal Care (ANC) card from nearest PHC/ASHA worker
Mother and Child Protection Card (issued at PHC)

how_to_apply.online: Register with the nearest ASHA worker in your village or visit the nearest PHC (Primary Health Centre)
how_to_apply.offline: Walk into any government Primary Health Centre for free antenatal registration

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
schemes.benefit_summary: Free comprehensive antenatal care services for pregnant women in 2nd and 3rd trimester on the 9th of every month.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: गर्भवती महिलाओं को गर्भावस्था की दूसरी और तीसरी तिमाही में हर महीने की 9 तारीख को निःशुल्क प्रसव पूर्व स्वास्थ्य सेवाएं प्रदान की जाती हैं।

other_conditions: Applicant must be in 2nd or 3rd trimester of pregnancy
Applicant should visit designated government health facilities on the 9th of every month
High-risk pregnancies receive priority follow-up care
exclusions: Pregnant women in first trimester are not eligible

offline: Visit nearest PMSMA health facility on the 9th of the month.
Register at the facility and undergo antenatal check-up.
Receive free tests, medicines, and follow-up care.

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme for CAPF and RPF Personnel
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs
schemes.benefit_summary: Scholarship for children and widows of Central Armed Police Forces (CRPF, BSF, CISF, ITBP, SSB, AR) and Railway Protection Force personnel. ₹2,500/month for boys, ₹3,000/month for girls studying professional/technical courses.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: CAPF (CRPF, BSF, CISF, ITBP, SSB) और RPF के जवानों के बच्चों और विधवाओं को छात्रवृत्ति। लड़कों को ₹2,500/माह और लड़कियों को ₹3,000/माह।

other_conditions: Parent/guardian must be a current or ex-serving CAPF (CRPF, BSF, CISF, ITBP, SSB, Assam Rifles) or RPF personnel
Priority to children of personnel killed/disabled in action or died in service
Student must be studying in recognised professional/technical institution (AICTE, MCI, BCI, UGC approved)
Minimum 60% marks in previous qualifying exam
Age limit: 18-25 years
exclusions: Students studying non-technical/non-professional courses like BA, BCom, BSc (general)
Children of state police personnel (different scheme applies)
Students who have failed or repeated a year
Those already receiving scholarship from other central government sources

documents_required: Service certificate of parent (from commanding officer)
Certificate of ex-serviceman or death/disability certificate (if applicable)

how_to_apply.online: Apply via scholarships.gov.in (NSP Portal) under Ministry of Home Affairs schemes
how_to_apply.offline: No offline application — NSP portal mandatory

life_events: parent in CRPF BSF CISF ITBP

schemes.name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship Program
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Minority Affairs
schemes.benefit_summary: Financial assistance for meritorious minority girl students studying in Classes 9 to 12.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: कक्षा 9 से 12 तक पढ़ने वाली अल्पसंख्यक समुदाय की मेधावी छात्राओं को वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान की जाती है।

other_conditions: Applicant must be studying in Class 9 to 12
Minimum 50% marks in previous qualifying examination
Only two students from a family can avail the scholarship
Applicant should not be receiving any other Central Government scholarship
exclusions: Students studying abroad are not eligible
Male students are not eligible
Students with family income above Rs. 2 lakh are not eligible

online: Complete new registration and mobile verification
Login using OTR ID and password
Fill the application form and upload documents

life_events: scored 50 percent or above in previous class

schemes.name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships for College and University Students
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Education
schemes.benefit_summary: Merit-cum-means scholarship for students in Class 12 who scored above 80th percentile in their board exam and family income is below ₹8 lakh/year. ₹10,000/year for graduation, ₹20,000/year for postgraduation.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: Class 12 में बोर्ड परीक्षा में 80वें पर्सेंटाइल से ऊपर और परिवार की आय ₹8 लाख से कम हो तो — ग्रेजुएशन के लिए ₹10,000/साल और पोस्टग्रेजुएशन के लिए ₹20,000/साल।

other_conditions: Must have scored above the 80th percentile in Class 12 State Board exam
Must be pursuing regular (not distance) undergraduate or postgraduate course
Must be studying in a college or university recognised by UGC
Family income must be below ₹8 lakh per year
exclusions: Students in distance/correspondence courses
Students in diploma courses not recognised by UGC
Students whose family income exceeds ₹8 lakh
Students not in top 80th percentile of Class 12 board

documents_required: Income certificate of parent/guardian (below ₹8 lakh, issued by SDM/tehsil)

how_to_apply.online: Apply via scholarships.gov.in (NSP Portal) — complete OTR first
how_to_apply.offline: No offline application — NSP portal mandatory

schemes.name: Ishan Uday Scholarship Scheme for North Eastern Region
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Education and University Grants Commission
schemes.benefit_summary: Scholarship for students from North Eastern Region pursuing higher education in general, technical, medical and professional courses.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: पूर्वोत्तर क्षेत्र के छात्रों को सामान्य, तकनीकी, मेडिकल और प्रोफेशनल पाठ्यक्रमों में उच्च शिक्षा के लिए छात्रवृत्ति प्रदान की जाती है।

other_conditions: Applicant must be a domicile of North Eastern Region
Must have passed Class 12 or equivalent in the previous year
Must have secured admission in first year of eligible degree course
Institution must have valid AISHE code
Scholarship is renewable subject to attendance and academic performance
exclusions: Students changing course during scholarship period
Students failing to get promoted to next year
Students studying in non-recognized institutions

online: Track application status through NSP portal

life_events: needs financial support for college fees

schemes.name: PM Young Achievers Scholarship Award Scheme for Vibrant India
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.benefit_summary: Scholarship for OBC, EBC (Economically Backward Classes) and DNT (De-notified Tribes) students in Class 9 to 12 and Undergraduate. Ranges from ₹75,000/year (Class 9-10) to ₹1,25,000/year (Undergraduate). Based on a national entrance test (YET).
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: OBC, EBC और DNT समुदाय के Class 9 से UG तक के छात्रों के लिए। Class 9-10: ₹75,000/साल; Class 11-12: ₹1,25,000/साल। राष्ट्रीय प्रवेश परीक्षा (YET) के आधार पर।

other_conditions: Must belong to OBC, EBC (Extremely Backward Class), or DNT (De-notified, Nomadic, Semi-Nomadic Tribe) category
Family annual income must not exceed ₹2.5 lakh
Must qualify the YASASVI Entrance Test (YET) conducted by NTA
Must be studying in a recognised school or college
exclusions: Students not belonging to OBC, EBC, or DNT categories
Students whose family income exceeds ₹2.5 lakh
Students who do not appear in or qualify YET

documents_required: OBC/EBC/DNT caste certificate (issued by competent authority)
Income certificate (below ₹2.5 lakh, issued by tehsil)

how_to_apply.online: Register for YET exam at yet.nta.ac.in; apply for scholarship via scholarships.gov.in
how_to_apply.offline: No offline application — NTA portal and NSP portal mandatory

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing & Urban Affairs
schemes.benefit_summary: Provides affordable pucca houses and home loan interest subsidy to eligible urban households under Housing for All mission.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: हाउसिंग फॉर ऑल मिशन के तहत पात्र शहरी परिवारों को किफायती पक्के मकान और होम लोन ब्याज सब्सिडी प्रदान की जाती है।

other_conditions: Applicant family must belong to EWS, LIG, MIG-1 or MIG-2 category
Applicant or family members should not own a pucca house anywhere in India
Applicant must reside in a town or city covered under PMAY-U
Applicant should not have availed benefits of any other central housing scheme
Aadhaar is mandatory
exclusions: Families already owning a pucca house
Applicants who already received benefits under any government housing scheme
Residents of non-notified urban areas

documents_required: Aadhar card or Aadhaar Enrolment ID
Affidavit of not owning pucca house
Affidavit for house construction under scheme

online: Fill beneficiary survey form and submit
offline: Visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC)
Purchase application form by paying Rs. 25 plus GST
Fill the form and attach required documents
Submit the application form at CSC

life_events: does not own a pucca house
middle income family seeking housing support

schemes.name: Rajiv Awas Yojana (RAY) — Slum Rehabilitation
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
schemes.benefit_summary: Free or heavily subsidised permanent housing for slum dwellers in urban areas. Government provides in-situ rehabilitation (rebuild on same land) or relocation to new housing. Note: RAY has been subsumed into PMAY-Urban — current slum rehabilitation applications go through PMAY-U.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: शहरी झुग्गी-झोपड़ी में रहने वालों को मुफ्त या सब्सिडी पर पक्का मकान। RAY अब PMAY-शहरी में शामिल हो गई है। आवेदन PMAY-U के तहत करें।

other_conditions: Must be a resident of a notified slum in an urban area
Must not own a pucca (permanent) house anywhere in India
Applications now handled under PMAY-Urban — visit pmaymis.gov.in
exclusions: Those who already own a permanent house anywhere in India
Rural residents (separate PMAY-Gramin scheme applies)
Those whose income exceeds ₹3 lakh/year for EWS category

documents_required: Proof of slum residence (Voter ID with slum address, or ration card)
Self-declaration of not owning a pucca house

how_to_apply.online: Apply via pmaymis.gov.in under PMAY-Urban (RAY has merged into PMAY-U)
how_to_apply.offline: Visit the nearest Urban Local Body (ULB) or municipal corporation office

schemes.name: Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme for Middle Income Group
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
schemes.benefit_summary: Provides interest subsidy on housing loans for middle-income families under PMAY.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: मध्य आय वर्ग के परिवारों को होम लोन पर ब्याज सब्सिडी प्रदान की जाती है।

other_conditions: Applicant family should not own a pucca house anywhere in India
Applicant should not have availed benefits under any other central housing scheme
MIG-I income should be between ₹6 lakh and ₹12 lakh annually
MIG-II income should be between ₹12 lakh and ₹18 lakh annually
Loan must be taken from approved banks or housing finance institutions
Preference may be given to women, SC/ST/OBC, disabled persons, and transgender applicants
exclusions: Families already owning a pucca house
Applicants already availing central housing assistance

offline: Visit a participating bank or housing finance institution
Fill and submit the CLSS application form with required documents
Loan application is verified and processed
Interest subsidy is credited directly to the loan account
Track application status through the CLAP portal

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.benefit_summary: A government awareness and welfare initiative for the girl child. Directly linked to Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana for savings. Provides support for girls' education, health, and protection through Anganwadi centres and district-level campaigns.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: बेटी की शिक्षा, स्वास्थ्य और सुरक्षा के लिए सरकारी कार्यक्रम। सुकन्या समृद्धि योजना से जुड़ा है। आंगनवाड़ी और जिला केंद्रों पर सेवाएं मिलती हैं।

other_conditions: Targets families with girl children
Services delivered through Anganwadi centres and district task forces
Connects families to Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana account opening

documents_required: Birth certificate of the girl child

how_to_apply.online: Visit wcd.nic.in or contact nearest Anganwadi centre
how_to_apply.offline: Visit nearest Anganwadi centre or District Women and Child Development Office

schemes.name: One Stop Centre Scheme (Sakhi)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.benefit_summary: Emergency support centre for women affected by violence. Provides police help, medical care, legal aid, psychological counselling, and temporary shelter — all under one roof, free of charge, available 24/7.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: हिंसा से प्रभावित महिलाओं के लिए आपातकालीन सहायता केंद्र। पुलिस, चिकित्सा, कानूनी सहायता, मनोवैज्ञानिक परामर्श और अस्थायी आश्रय — सब एक ही जगह, मुफ्त, 24/7।

other_conditions: Any woman affected by violence — domestic abuse, sexual assault, acid attack, human trafficking, etc.
No income or caste restriction — open to all women regardless of background
Available in all districts across India (at District Hospital or equivalent)

documents_required: No documents required in emergency — walk in directly

how_to_apply.online: Call Women Helpline: 181 (national number, 24/7)
how_to_apply.offline: Visit the nearest One Stop Centre (Sakhi Centre) — usually located at or near District Hospital

schemes.name: Mahila Shakti Kendra
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.benefit_summary: Community support centres for rural women in aspirational districts. Provides training, skill development, digital literacy, awareness about government schemes, and connects women to health and nutrition services through college student volunteers.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: ग्रामीण महिलाओं के लिए सामुदायिक केंद्र। सरकारी योजनाओं की जानकारी, डिजिटल साक्षरता, स्किल ट्रेनिंग और स्वास्थ्य सेवाओं से जोड़ना — कॉलेज के छात्रों के माध्यम से।

other_conditions: Primarily targets women in rural areas of aspirational/backward districts
Any woman can access services at the centre
Services delivered by college student volunteers trained by the government

documents_required: No strict documents required — walk-in access

how_to_apply.online: Contact nearest District Women and Child Development Office
how_to_apply.offline: Visit nearest Anganwadi centre or Mahila Shakti Kendra in your district

schemes.name: Mission Saksham Anganwadi & Poshan 2.0
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.benefit_summary: Provides supplementary nutrition, health monitoring, and nutrition support to children, pregnant women, and lactating mothers through Anganwadi Centres.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: आंगनवाड़ी केंद्रों के माध्यम से बच्चों, गर्भवती महिलाओं और स्तनपान कराने वाली माताओं को पोषण, स्वास्थ्य निगरानी और पूरक आहार प्रदान किया जाता है।

states: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
other_conditions: Children must be below 6 years of age
Pregnant women are eligible
Lactating mothers up to 6 months postpartum are eligible
Beneficiary should register at the nearest Anganwadi Centre
exclusions: Children above 6 years (school nutrition covered by PM Poshan/mid-day meal scheme)

offline: Visit the nearest Anganwadi Centre or Social Welfare Department office
Collect and fill the enrollment form
Attach required documents
Submit the form at the Anganwadi Centre
Receive nutrition and health benefits after enrollment

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Rural Development (NSAP)
schemes.benefit_summary: Monthly pension of ₹300 for BPL widows aged 40 to 79 years. Pension increases to ₹500/month after age 80. Many states top up this amount further. Money goes directly to your bank account.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: BPL विधवाओं को 40 से 79 साल तक ₹300/माह पेंशन। 80 साल के बाद ₹500/माह। कई राज्य और अधिक पैसे देते हैं। पैसा सीधे बैंक खाते में।

other_conditions: Must be a widow (husband deceased)
Must be aged 40 years or above
Must belong to a BPL (Below Poverty Line) household
exclusions: Widows who have remarried
Widows above poverty line (non-BPL)
Widows already receiving pension under any other NSAP scheme

documents_required: Age proof (birth certificate, school certificate, or Aadhaar)

how_to_apply.online: Apply via nsap.nic.in or state government social welfare portal
how_to_apply.offline: Visit the nearest Block Development Office (BDO) or Gram Panchayat office with documents

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Rural Development (NSAP)
schemes.benefit_summary: Monthly pension of ₹300 for BPL persons aged 18 to 79 with severe (80%+) disability. Increases to ₹500/month after age 80. Many states provide additional top-up amount. Money goes directly to bank account.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: BPL विकलांग व्यक्तियों को 18 से 79 साल तक ₹300/माह पेंशन। 80%+ विकलांगता जरूरी। 80 साल के बाद ₹500/माह। पैसा सीधे बैंक में।

other_conditions: Must have severe or multiple disability (80% or more disability — certified by government medical board)
Must belong to BPL household
Must be aged 18 years or above
Must have a UDID (Unique Disability ID) card
exclusions: Persons with disability less than 80%
Persons not in BPL category
Those already receiving pension under another NSAP scheme

documents_required: Disability certificate (80%+ disability, issued by government medical board)
UDID card (Unique Disability ID — apply at swavlambancard.gov.in)

how_to_apply.online: Apply via nsap.nic.in or state government social welfare portal
how_to_apply.offline: Visit nearest Block Development Office (BDO) or District Social Welfare Office

schemes.name: National Family Benefit Scheme (Indira Gandhi Anmol Roji)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Rural Development (NSAP)
schemes.benefit_summary: One-time lump sum payment of ₹20,000 to a BPL family when the primary breadwinner (male or female) dies. This helps the family manage the immediate financial shock of losing their main income earner.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: BPL परिवार के मुख्य कमाने वाले (महिला या पुरुष) की मृत्यु पर ₹20,000 एकमुश्त सहायता। परिवार के सबसे बड़े आर्थिक झटके में मदद।

other_conditions: The deceased person must have been the primary breadwinner of the family
The deceased must have been aged 18 to 59 years at the time of death
The deceased's family must be registered under BPL
A homemaker woman is also considered a breadwinner under this scheme
Application must be made within 90 days of the death
exclusions: Families who are not BPL
Death of breadwinner outside the 18-59 age range
Application made after 90 days of death (state governments may have different rules)

documents_required: Death certificate of breadwinner (issued by municipal or gram panchayat)
Bank passbook (family member's account, with IFSC code)

how_to_apply.online: Apply via nsap.nic.in or state government social welfare portal
how_to_apply.offline: Visit the nearest Block Development Office (BDO) or Gram Panchayat office within 90 days of death

schemes.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Rural Development
schemes.benefit_summary: Provides free skill training, placement assistance, and career support to rural poor youth for sustainable employment.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: ग्रामीण गरीब युवाओं को रोजगार हेतु निःशुल्क कौशल प्रशिक्षण, प्लेसमेंट सहायता और करियर सहायता प्रदान की जाती है।

other_conditions: Applicant must belong to a rural poor household
Women, PwDs, transgender persons, PVTGs and special groups are eligible up to 45 years
Youth from MGNREGA worker households are eligible
Youth from RSBY card holder households are eligible
Youth from AAY or BPL card holder households are eligible
Youth from NRLM SHG households are eligible
exclusions: Urban residents
Those above 35 years (except SC/ST/women/PWD up to 45 years)
Those who are already formally employed

online: Visit the Kaushal Panjee official website
Fill the registration form and upload documents
Submit the application and save the registration ID

schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.benefit_summary: Provides skill training, toolkit incentives, collateral-free loans, digital incentives, and market support to traditional artisans and craftspeople.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: पारंपरिक कारीगरों और शिल्पकारों को कौशल प्रशिक्षण, टूलकिट सहायता, बिना गारंटी ऋण, डिजिटल प्रोत्साहन और मार्केटिंग सहायता प्रदान की जाती है।

other_conditions: Applicant must be an artisan or craftsperson working with hands and tools
Applicant must work in the unorganized sector
Applicant must be engaged in one of the notified traditional family-based trades
Applicant should not have taken loans under PMEGP, PM SVANidhi, Mudra or similar schemes in the last 5 years
Only one member per family can avail benefits under the scheme
exclusions: Government employees and their family members

online: Visit the nearest Common Service Centre (CSC)
Fill and submit the PM Vishwakarma application form
Application is verified by Gram Panchayat or Urban Local Body
District and Screening Committees approve eligible applicants
Receive Vishwakarma ID Card and scheme benefits after approval

schemes.name: Stand-Up India
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Finance
schemes.benefit_summary: Provides bank loans from ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to start greenfield enterprises.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: एससी/एसटी और महिला उद्यमियों को नया व्यवसाय शुरू करने के लिए ₹10 लाख से ₹1 करोड़ तक का बैंक ऋण प्रदान किया जाता है।

other_conditions: Loan is available only for greenfield enterprises
Male applicants must belong to SC or ST category
Women applicants of any category are eligible
Applicant must not be a defaulter to any bank or financial institution
For non-individual enterprises, at least 51% ownership must be held by SC/ST or women entrepreneur
exclusions: Applicants who are bank loan defaulters

online: Bank or financial institution will contact the applicant
offline: Visit the nearest participating bank branch or Lead District Manager office
Collect and fill the application form
Submit required documents
Complete verification and loan processing

schemes.name: DPIIT Internship Scheme
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry
schemes.benefit_summary: Provides internship opportunities with the Government of India along with a stipend of ₹10,000 per month and experience certificate.
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: भारत सरकार के साथ इंटर्नशिप का अवसर, ₹10,000 प्रतिमाह स्टाइपेंड और अनुभव प्रमाण पत्र प्रदान किया जाता है।

other_conditions: Applicant must be pursuing undergraduate, postgraduate, or research studies
Applicant must belong to domains such as Engineering, Management, Law, Economics, Finance, Computers, or Library Management
Students from other domains may also be considered based on requirements
Internship duration can be from 1 to 3 months
Intern must submit a report at the end of internship
exclusions: Candidates who do not complete internship satisfactorily will not receive stipend or certificate

online: Fill in the online application form
Verify mobile number and email ID
Selected candidates will receive internship offer from DPIIT

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
schemes.ministry: Ministry of MSME (implemented by KVIC)
schemes.benefit_summary: Start a new small business and get a government subsidy of 15% to 35% of the total project cost. Loan up to ₹50 lakh for manufacturing, ₹20 lakh for services. No collateral needed for loans up to ₹10 lakh (covered by CGTMSE).
schemes.benefit_summary_hi: नया छोटा व्यवसाय शुरू करें और सरकार से 15% से 35% तक सब्सिडी पाएं। मैन्युफैक्चरिंग के लिए ₹50 लाख और सेवा के लिए ₹20 लाख तक का लोन। SC/ST/महिलाओं को ज्यादा सब्सिडी।

other_conditions: Must be starting a NEW business unit (not expanding an existing one)
Business must be in manufacturing, processing, or service sector
For project cost above ₹10 lakh (manufacturing) or ₹5 lakh (services), minimum Class 8 pass required
General category must contribute 10% of project cost; SC/ST/women/OBC/minorities contribute 5%
Must not have defaulted on any bank loan
exclusions: Existing businesses already running (only new units are eligible)
Those who have already availed subsidy under PMRY, REGP, or any other central/state subsidy-linked scheme for the same unit
Businesses involving tobacco, liquor, or items in PMEGP negative list
Businesses outside India
Partnership or limited company firms (only individuals, SHGs, co-operatives, and charitable trusts eligible)

documents_required: Educational certificates (Class 8 pass certificate if project above threshold)
Detailed Project Report (DPR) — business plan with cost breakdown
Bank statements (last 6 months if existing account)

how_to_apply.online: Apply at kviconline.gov.in/pmegp → fill online application → submit DPR → bank processes loan
how_to_apply.offline: Visit the nearest KVIC (Khadi and Village Industries Commission) district office or District Industries Centre (DIC)
